products.title: The Lattice Basket
products.product_type: Natural Fiber, Raffia, Straw Baskets & Summer Baskets
products.description: Handwoven by Colombian artisans, the Lattice Basket is defined by an open lattice weave and a lightweight, architectural form. Elongated straps create clean vertical lines and an easy carry, while the natural fibers and signature tagua seed charm bring a subtle contrast of texture and material.

Finished with our signature tagua seed detail, each piece celebrates the beauty of organic materials and timeless design. A secure zip closure and structured silhouette offer effortless functionality, making it an elegant companion from day to evening.
